meta.title: What's stopping a Ukraine-style drone attack on the United States?
meta.description:
Last weekend, Ukraine launched an unprecedented drone attack against four Russian air bases, destroying an as-yet unconfirmed number of long-range nuclear-capable strategic bombers and exceedingly rare airborne early warning and control aircraft.

But could an adversary nation launch a similar attack against the mainland United States? Let's discuss.
